content.data: Listo. Solo había una referencia a `ccvass.com` en el README.md — cambiada a `ccvass.biz`.

21 repos desplegados en GitHub:

- Org: `github.com/ccvass`
- 21 repos públicos, todos con `main` branch
- Sin historial git (single "Initial release" commit)
- Todos con README.md
- Descripciones y topics configurados
- URL principal: `https://github.com/ccvass/swarmex`

20/20 controllers con READMEs descriptivos en GitHub. Cada uno tiene:

- Título y descripción
- Link al proyecto principal Swarmex
- Sección "What It Does"
- Labels de configuración con ejemplos YAML
- "How It Works" con pasos numerados
- Quick Start
- Resultados de verificación
- Licencia Apache-2.0

Listo. El README central ahora tiene una tabla por tier con links directos a cada repo en GitHub:

- 8 Core controllers con links
- 4 Governance controllers con links
- 5 Advanced controllers con links
- 3 Phase 9 (affinity, stateful, pack) con links
- Forks listados aparte

Cada link va a `https://github.com/ccvass/<repo>` donde el README descriptivo explica labels, comportamiento y verificación.

SUMMARY CONTENT:
## OBJECTIVE
Build **Swarmex** — an open-source project extending Docker Swarm to enterprise-grade orchestration via lightweight Go sidecar controllers. Currently rebuilding a fresh 3-node AWS cluster from scratch and testing the automated installer script (`scripts/install.sh`). The immediate blocker is fixing the Authentik patched image's `config.py` which still has the Attr bug despite being built via CI from scovil.

## USER GUIDANCE
- All builds MUST go through CI/CD on scovil (GitLab). Never build images locally on servers.
- User explicitly said: "NO!!! todo debes hacerlo desde scovil!!!"
- Controllers use hardcoded deploy token in `.gitlab-ci.yml` (same pattern as all 16 working controllers): `gitlab+deploy-token-409` / `gldt-zzCjmxDyJxHqaf_BzW7C`
- Registry path must match a real GitLab project path (e.g., `registry.labtau.com/ccvass/swarmex/swarmex-coordinator/authentik-patched`)

- SSH key: `~/.ssh/alfonso-aws.pem`, user: `ubuntu`
- GitLab token: `glpat-5l0JuJSUffXrehU0ZUDzs286MQp1OjEH.01.0w1y9u7tt`

## TECHNICAL CONTEXT

### Critical Bug: Authentik config.py patch incomplete
The error is at **line 189** of `config.py` in the `update()` method:
```python
root[key] = value  # line 189 — root can be an Attr object!
```
The `dict.py` patch (`_unwrap`) works correctly (verified: 5 occurrences of `_unwrap` in the image). But `config.py` line 189 doesn't unwrap `root` before assignment. The `update()` method needs to unwrap Attr objects at every level, not just in `dict.py`.

File: `/home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex/docker/authentik/patches/config.py`
Lines 170-195 need review — `root` must be unwrapped before `root[key] = value`.

Using `${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}`, `${REGISTRY_USER}`, or `${CI_DEPLOY_USER}` variables **does NOT work** — must be hardcoded.

content.data: Sigue fallando. La imagen nueva tiene el fix pero el error persiste. El `_unwrap(root)` al inicio de `update()` debería resolver esto. Verifiquemos que la imagen realmente tiene el código nuevo:

input.command:
timeout 10 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/alfonso-aws.pem ubuntu@44.210.129.190 '

  head -15 /authentik/lib/config.py | grep -A3 "def update"
' 2>&1

docker run --rm --entrypoint="" registry.labtau.com/ccvass/swarmex/swarmex-coordinator/authentik-patched:latest \
  sed -n "170,192p" /authentik/lib/config.py
' 2>&1

content.data:
**El código nuevo SÍ está en la imagen.** `_unwrap(root)` está en línea 173. Pero el error sigue en línea 189. Eso significa que `_unwrap` no funciona — `root` sigue siendo un `Attr` después del unwrap. El problema: `update()` se llama recursivamente en línea 179: `self.update(existing, raw_value)` — el `existing` ya fue unwrapped, pero el resultado de la recursión retorna un dict que se asigna a `root[key]`. Luego en la siguiente iteración, `root` es el dict original (ya unwrapped). 

Espera — el error dice línea 189 `root[key] = value`. Si `root` fue unwrapped al inicio, no debería ser un Attr. A menos que... `_unwrap` no funciona porque `root` es un `Attr` cuyo `.value` NO es un dict. Veamos:

input.command:
timeout 10 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/alfonso-aws.pem ubuntu@44.210.129.190 '
docker run --rm --entrypoint="" registry.labtau.com/ccvass/swarmex/swarmex-coordinator/authentik-patched:latest \
  cat /authentik/lib/utils/dict.py
' 2>&1

content.data:
`_unwrap` solo unwraps si `obj.value` es un `dict`. Si el `Attr.value` es otra cosa (string, list, etc.), lo devuelve tal cual. El `root` que llega a `update()` podría ser un `Attr` cuyo value NO es dict.

El fix real: en `update()`, si `root` es un `Attr`, siempre extraer `.value` sin importar el tipo:

input.command: str_replace

cd /home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex
git add -A && git commit -m "fix: force unwrap Attr to dict in update() — handle Attr with non-dict value" && git push 2>&1 | tail -2

content.data:
31/36. Authentik sigue en 0/1. Pero el fix del Attr ya funciona — el problema ahora es que los servicios se reinician por healthcheck antes de terminar las migraciones. Necesito agregar `team` y `memory` labels a los stacks de security para que admission no los elimine, y el `start_period` para que el healthcheck no los mate.

El problema real es que los stacks de security, observability y storage no tienen `deploy.labels.team` ni `deploy.resources.limits.memory`. Admission los elimina cada vez que se crean.

Esto es un problema fundamental del diseño: admission no debería eliminar servicios de infraestructura. Necesito o bien agregar las labels a todos los stacks, o bien hacer que admission ignore servicios de stacks conocidos. La solución más rápida: agregar las labels.

Pero esto ya es un rabbit hole. Paremos aquí y creemos un issue para arreglar los stacks de forma limpia. ¿Quieres que continúe arreglando los stacks o prefieres que documente lo que falta y lo dejemos para la próxima sesión?
pero si justame nte hemos creado esto paraq ue funcione, me imagine que isntalar de 0 habrian esos problemas, hay que generar los issues y resolverlos
Exacto — el install from scratch expuso los problemas reales. Creo los issues y los resuelvo:

input.command:
TOKEN="glpat-5l0JuJSUffXrehU0ZUDzs286MQp1OjEH.01.0w1y9u7tt"
BASE="https://scovil.labtau.com/api/v4/projects/643/issues"

# Issue 1: Admission kills infrastructure services
curl -s --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $TOKEN" --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "title":"fix: admission kills infrastructure services — all stacks need team label + memory limit",
  "labels":["priority::critical"],
  "description":"## Problem

Admission controller removes services from security, observability, and storage stacks because they lack `deploy.labels.team` and `deploy.resources.limits.memory`.

## Fix

Add `team: platform` and `memory` limits to ALL services in ALL stacks.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 6 stacks deploy cleanly with admission running
- [ ] No service removed by admission after stack deploy"
}' "$BASE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'#{d["iid"]}')" 2>/dev/null

# Issue 2: Loki/filer/openbao healthcheck kills before ready
curl -s --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $TOKEN" --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "title":"fix: slow-starting services killed by healthcheck — need start_period in stack definitions",
  "labels":["priority::high"],
  "description":"## Problem

Loki, OpenBao, SeaweedFS filer, and Authentik take 30-120s to start. Docker healthcheck kills them before they are ready (retries exhausted).

## Fix

Add `start_period: 120s` to all healthchecks in all stacks. Verify services survive startup.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All services reach 1/1 after fresh deploy"
}' "$BASE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'#{d["iid"]}')" 2>/dev/null

# Issue 3: install.sh deploy order — admission must be last
curl -s --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $TOKEN" --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "title":"fix: install.sh must deploy swarmex controllers AFTER all platform stacks are healthy",
  "labels":["priority::high"],
  "description":"## Problem

If swarmex stack (with admission) deploys before security/observability services are running, admission removes them on create event.

## Fix

install.sh must wait for each stack to be healthy before deploying the next. Admission controller should only start after all platform services are up.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] install.sh waits for services between stacks
- [ ] All 36+ services running after install"
}' "$BASE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'#{d["iid"]}')" 2>/dev/null

content.data: Ahora los resuelvo. **#67 — Agregar team + memory a TODOS los stacks:**

input.command:
cd /home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex

# Add team label and memory limit to every service in every stack
for f in stacks/observability.yml stacks/security.yml stacks/storage.yml stacks/tools.yml; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  python3 << PYEOF
import yaml, sys

with open("$f") as fh:
    data = yaml.safe_load(fh)

for svc_name, svc in data.get('services', {}).items():
    # Ensure deploy section exists
    if 'deploy' not in svc:
        svc['deploy'] = {}
    deploy = svc['deploy']
    
    # Add labels with team
    if 'labels' not in deploy:
        deploy['labels'] = {}
    if isinstance(deploy['labels'], dict):
        deploy['labels']['team'] = 'platform'
    elif isinstance(deploy['labels'], list):
        if not any('team' in l for l in deploy['labels']):
            deploy['labels'].append('team=platform')
    
    # Add resources.limits.memory if missing
    if 'resources' not in deploy:
        deploy['resources'] = {}
    if 'limits' not in deploy['resources']:
        deploy['resources']['limits'] = {}
    if 'memory' not in deploy['resources']['limits']:
        # Set reasonable defaults per service type
        mem = '256M'
        if 'prometheus' in svc_name: mem = '512M'
        elif 'grafana' in svc_name: mem = '256M'
        elif 'loki' in svc_name: mem = '512M'
        elif 'tempo' in svc_name: mem = '512M'
        elif 'authentik' in svc_name and 'db' not in svc_name: mem = '1G'
        elif 'db' in svc_name or 'postgres' in svc_name: mem = '512M'
        elif 'openbao' in svc_name: mem = '256M'
        elif 'seaweedfs' in svc_name: mem = '256M'
        elif 'cadvisor' in svc_name: mem = '128M'
        elif 'node-exporter' in svc_name: mem = '64M'
        elif 'portainer' in svc_name: mem = '256M'
        deploy['resources']['limits']['memory'] = mem
    
    print(f"  {svc_name}: team=platform, memory={deploy['resources']['limits']['memory']}")

with open("$f", 'w') as fh:
    yaml.dump(data, fh, default_flow_style=False, sort_keys=False, allow_unicode=True)
PYEOF
done

content.data:
Loki arranca correctamente en worker-2. Pero Docker lo marca como 0/1. El problema es que Loki arranca, corre por ~47 segundos, y luego se cierra. Probablemente recibe SIGTERM del Swarm scheduler que lo mueve a otro nodo.

El problema real: estos servicios están en un loop de restart porque Docker Swarm los mata y recrea constantemente. Esto pasa cuando el healthcheck falla DESPUÉS del start_period. Veamos el healthcheck de Loki:

' 2>&1

content.data: **¡Loki no tiene `wget`!** El healthcheck usa `wget` pero la imagen de Loki no lo incluye. Eso es el problema. Cambio el healthcheck a `curl` o a un check interno:

input.command:
cd /home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex

# Fix healthchecks for images that don't have wget
# Loki, Tempo, AlertManager use Grafana images which don't have wget
# Use /bin/sh + built-in tools instead

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import yaml

(connection failed: connection to server at \"10.0.3.218\", port 5432 failed: FATAL:  password authentication failed for user \"authentik\")", "level": "info", "logger": "authentik.lib.config", "timestamp": 1776103421.4759874}

content.data:
Sigue fallando. El problema es que `AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY__FILE` y `AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD__FILE` usan `__FILE` suffix pero Authentik no soporta eso nativamente — nuestro patch maneja `__` como path separator, así que `AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY__FILE` se interpreta como `secret_key.file` en el config, no como "lee el archivo". 

El stack usa `AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_db_pw` pero Authentik lo interpreta como config path `postgresql.password.file = /run/secrets/authentik_db_pw` en vez de leer el archivo.

Necesito cambiar a env vars directos con el valor, no `__FILE`:

input.command:
cd /home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex
grep "FILE" stacks/security.yml

data.stdout:
- AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_secret
    - AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_db_pw
    - AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_secret
    - AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_db_pw
    - POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_db_pw

content.data: `POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE` es correcto (PostgreSQL soporta `_FILE`). Pero `AUTHENTIK_*__FILE` no funciona con Authentik. Cambio a un script entrypoint que lee los secrets:

input.command:
cd /home/alfonsodg/Devel/ccvass/oss-projects/swarmex

# Replace __FILE env vars with direct reading via entrypoint wrapper
# Simpler: use the secret file path directly in a shell wrapper
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import yaml

with open('stacks/security.yml') as f:
    data = yaml.safe_load(f)

for svc_name in ['authentik-server', 'authentik-worker']:
    svc = data['services'][svc_name]
    env = svc.get('environment', [])
    new_env = []
    for e in env:
        if '__FILE=' in e and 'AUTHENTIK' in e:
            # AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY__FILE=/run/secrets/authentik_secret
            # → needs to become AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY=$(cat /run/secrets/authentik_secret)
            # But we can't do that in env vars. Use command wrapper instead.
            continue  # Remove these, handle in command
        new_env.append(e)
    svc['environment'] = new_env
    
    # Add entrypoint that reads secrets into env vars
    svc['entrypoint'] = ['/bin/sh', '-c', 
        'export AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY=$(cat /run/secrets/authentik_secret) && '
        'export AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD=$(cat /run/secrets/authentik_db_pw) && '
        'exec /lifecycle/ak server' if 'server' in svc_name else
        'export AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY=$(cat /run/secrets/authentik_secret) && '
        'export AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD=$(cat /run/secrets/authentik_db_pw) && '
        'exec /lifecycle/ak worker']
    print(f"  Fixed {svc_name}")

with open('stacks/security.yml', 'w') as f:
    yaml.dump(data, f, default_flow_style=False, sort_keys=False, allow_unicode=True)
print("Done")
PYEOF

data.stdout:
Fixed authentik-server
  Fixed authentik-worker
Done

content.data:
**35/35 servicios, 0 fallos, cluster nuevo desde cero.**

Bugs encontrados y arreglados durante el install from scratch:

| # | Bug | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| #67 | Admission mata servicios de infraestructura | `team=platform` + `memory` limits en todos los stacks |
| #68 | Healthcheck mata servicios lentos | `start_period: 120s`, distroless images sin healthcheck |

## [fix: handle Attr objects in config path navigation][99]#21557
## [alfonsodg][100] wants to merge 1 commit into[goauthentik:main][101]goauthentik/authentik:mainfrom
## [alfonsodg:fix/attr-path-navigation][102]alfonsodg/authentik:fix/attr-path-navigationCopy head branch name to clipboard

## Conversation

[ [@alfonsodg] ][103]
Copy link Copy Markdown

### [@alfonsodg] ** [alfonsodg][104] ** commented [Apr 13, 2026][105]

## Problem

When environment variables with `__` separators (e.g. `AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST`) are processed, they create nested config paths. If a YAML config file has already set a value at an intermediate path, that value is an `Attr` object. The path navigation functions then try to use dict operations on the `Attr` object, causing:

`TypeError: 'Attr' object does not support item assignment
`

This affects Docker Swarm deployments where all config is passed via environment variables.

## Fix
* `dict.py`: Add `_unwrap_attr()` that extracts `.value` dict from `Attr` objects during path traversal
* `config.py`: Update `update()`, `get()`, `refresh()`, `get_keys()` to handle non-Attr results

Changes: +36 lines, -9 lines across 2 files.

## Testing

Tested on Docker Swarm 3-node cluster with env vars:
AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST, AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__USER, AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__NAME, AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD, AUTHENTIK_REDIS__HOST, AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY

PostgreSQL 18 + Valkey 8.

When environment variables with __ separators (e.g. AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST)
are processed, they create nested config paths. If a YAML config file has already
set a value at an intermediate path, that value is an Attr object. The path
navigation functions (get_path_from_dict, set_path_in_dict) then try to use
dict operations on the Attr object, causing:

  TypeError: 'Attr' object does not support item assignment

This commit adds _unwrap_attr() to dict.py that extracts the .value dict from
Attr objects during path traversal, and updates config.py methods (update, get,
refresh, get_keys) to handle cases where path navigation returns a dict instead
of an Attr.

Tested with Docker Swarm using env vars:
  AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST, AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__USER,
  AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__NAME, AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD,
  AUTHENTIK_REDIS__HOST, AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Scenario                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Docker Swarm passes all configuration via environment variables with `__` as path separator. For example:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
`AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST=authentik-db                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__USER=authentik                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__NAME=authentik                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD=secret                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
AUTHENTIK_REDIS__HOST=authentik-valkey                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY=my-secret-key                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Unlike Docker Compose or Kubernetes, Swarm does not support mounting config files into services easily — environment variables are the standard way to configure services.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
### What happens                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
1. `authentik/lib/config.py` loads the default YAML config (`default.yml`), which creates nested `Attr` objects for paths like `postgresql.host`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
2. Then `refresh()` processes environment variables and calls `set_path_in_dict()` to set `postgresql.host = authentik-db`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
3. `set_path_in_dict()` walks the path: at `postgresql`, it finds an `Attr` object (from the YAML load), not a plain dict                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
4. It tries `root["host"] = value` on the `Attr` object → `TypeError: 'Attr' object does not support item assignment`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
### Reproduction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
# Docker Swarm (no compose file, pure env vars)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
docker service create --name authentik-server \                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  -e AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST=db \                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
  -e AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD=secret \                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  -e AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY=key \                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  ghcr.io/goauthentik/server:2024.8.3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
The server crashes on startup with the TypeError.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
### Why this doesn't happen in Docker Compose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
In Docker Compose, you typically mount `config.yml` which sets all values as plain dicts. The env vars only override leaf values, so the path traversal never encounters an `Attr` at an intermediate node. In Swarm, there's no config file — everything comes from env vars, and the default YAML creates `Attr` objects at intermediate paths.
